ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period of the data */,
  "lrm" REAL /* Real money balances (LRM) */,
  "lry" REAL /* Real income (LRY) */,
  "lpy" REAL /* Real price of investment goods (LPY) */,
  "ibo" REAL /* Interest rate on government bonds (IBO) */,
  "ide" REAL /* Expected inflation rate (IDE) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data entry was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., 1974Q1) */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the time period */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time period is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., LRM, LRY) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the economic indicator */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the indicator details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the indicator is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Central Bank, Statistical Office) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the source details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the source is active */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the source's website or data portal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored user password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access log entry is active */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
